infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Klozu uses your camera so you can capture wardrobe items directly.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Klozu uses your photo library so you can upload closet items, onboarding outfit photos, and profile images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Klozu uses your location to personalize weather-aware outfit recommendations.
